channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-RNC chairman Whatley to face former Democrat Gov. Cooper in North Carolina Senate race
item.description: North Carolina primary voters on Tuesday set up a high-stakes match in November that will help decide which party controls the Senate.

item.title: Former MLB star Mark Teixeira wins GOP primary in Texas congressional race
item.description: Mark Teixeira secured the GOP nomination in Texas’ 21st District after winning more than 50% of the vote, avoiding a runoff in the crowded Republican ...

item.title: Why You Should Probably Be More Prejudiced
item.description: Prejudice is an inescapable concept. We all have prejudices. The question is, are they the right ones?

item.title: A Victory for Parental Common Sense over School Grooming Gag Rules
item.description: The Supreme Court strikes another blow for parents and against gender madness.

item.title: Cornyn, Paxton advance to runoff in Texas Republican primary for U.S. Senate
item.description: Longtime Sen. John Cornyn and MAGA favorite Ken Paxton are heading to a May runoff in Texas' Republican Senate primary, while Congresswoman Jasmine Cr...

item.title: Democrat Bill Would Flood Every School, Church, And Hospital With Illegal Squatters
item.description: Union bosses support this reckless policy because they are more concerned with politics than with protecting teachers and students.

item.title: Talarico wins Texas Senate Democratic nomination while Cornyn and Paxton head to Republican runoff
item.description: State Rep. James Talarico topped Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett in an expensive and fiercely contested Texas Senate Democratic primary that once again...

item.title: US 'winning decisively' against Iran, will achieve 'complete control' of airspace within days, Hegseth says
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth says America is winning decisively against Iran, predicting the US will achieve complete control of Iranian airspace.

item.title: GOP challenger Steve Toth ousts Rep. Dan Crenshaw in Texas primary
item.description: Republican challenger Steve Toth defeated U.S. Rep. Dan Crenshaw on Tuesday night, ousting the only House Republican in Texas who President Trump didn...

item.title: Sam Altman turned down a documentary’s requests to talk. So the director cast a ‘Sam Bot’ as its protagonist
item.description: Adam Bhala Lough said he got the idea for "Sam Bot" from OpenAI's audacious release of a chatbot that sounded like actress Scarlett Johansson.

item.title: Why Operation Epic Fury Is Catastrophic for Xi
item.description: The U.S.–Israeli military campaign has created palpable problems for China.

item.title: Top Democrats say 25-year-old AUMF won't cover Iran strike
item.description: Top Democrats argued Tuesday against applying a 25-year-old AUMF on the strikes against Iran while simultaneously suggesting the U.S. has been at war ...

item.title: Talarico defeats Crockett in heated primary as Democrats seek first Texas Senate seat in decades
item.description: Jasmine Crockett and James alarico each argued that they would be the stronger general election candidate in a state that backed Trump by almost 14 po...

item.title: Gun rights expert says Minnesota Dems tried to block her testimony on firearm bills to 'avoid' policy debate
item.description: Second Amendment advocate Amy Swearer says Minnesota Democrats limited her testimony on gun control bills, focusing on emotion over policy expertise.

item.title: Ella McCay — Hollywood’s Definitive Disaster
item.description: James L. Brooks loses his sense of humor to politics.

item.title: Michigan’s Dirty And Dead-Ridden Voter Rolls Escape Scrutiny
item.description: The Supreme Court this week passed on a watchdog's request to review lower court decisions finding Michigan's voter list clean enough.

item.title: Exclusive: Cyclops raises $8 million to build stablecoin infrastructure for payments companies
item.description: The startup’s customers include urban helicopter service Blade and Jeff Bezos’s Blue Origin.

item.title: Texas GOP Rep Wesley Hunt vows political comeback, does not yet endorse Cornyn or Paxton
item.description: Rep. Wesley Hunt vowed a comeback after finishing third in Texas Senate Republican primary behind John Cornyn and Ken Paxton on Tuesday.

item.title: 14 Pro-Life Alternatives To IVF For Infertile Couples Who Desire Children
item.description: As couples increasingly question IVF ethics, they are seeking better options. Here are 14 to consider.

item.title: Nationwide voter revolt over property taxes collides with reality that every other revenue source has been slashed already
item.description: “Completely slashing them is really unrealistic, since it really is the largest source of on revenues for most local governments in the United States....

item.title: US submarine sinks Iranian warship by torpedo in a first since World War II
The Hurdles to Democracy in Iran
item.description: And how to potentially overcome them.

item.title: California’s Dying Bullet Train Is A Preview Of A Newsom Presidency
item.description: California's high-speed rail project, approved in 2008 and under construction since 2015, is running out of money and time, while failing.

item.title: Finance leaders are divided on how they’d use potential tariff refunds—with just 18% saying they’d fully roll back price increases
item.description: Supreme Court’s IEEPA ruling raises questions on sharing potential refunds with customers or suppliers.

item.title: The Border Tax Is Back, and It’s Still a Terrible Idea
item.description: The BAT is a gamble with America’s economic future, and it’s not a gamble worth taking.

item.title: NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central Bank Minutes
item.description: Can algorithms that analyze central bank language help predict the next move in the yield curve? The post NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central ...

item.title: International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First
item.description: Women are three times more likely than men to invest in eating well. The post International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First appeared fi...

item.title: Three Levers That Drive VC Returns
item.description: Venture capitalists often emphasize their ability to pick winners. Yet the data tell a harsher story: roughly 90% of early-stage VCs fail to outperfor...

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...

item.title: Aligning Allocation to the Global Business Cycle
item.description: Static portfolios lag macro shifts. Predefined cycle triggers help practitioners adjust risk before markets reprice. The post Aligning Allocation to t...
